title: 向客户呈现分析与方案 / Presenting to Clients
summary: 呈现须清晰诚实:说明假设、风险、费用与替代方案,确保客户理解后由其自主决定,并提供书面文件。 / Present clearly and honestly: explain assumptions, risks, fees and alternatives, ensure the client understands, let them decide freely, and provide documentation.

sections.heading: 清晰与披露
sections.body: 用客户能懂的语言说明逻辑与不确定性;披露关键假设、风险、费用、冲突与替代选项。

sections.heading: Clarity & disclosure
sections.body: Explain in plain language with uncertainties; disclose key assumptions, risks, fees, conflicts and alternatives.

sections.heading: 客户决定
sections.body: 确保客户理解后由其自主决定,不施压;留存建议书/文件备查。

sections.heading: Client decides
sections.body: Ensure understanding, let the client decide without pressure, and keep the advice document on file.

keyPoints: 清晰、客户能懂 / Clear and understandable
披露假设/风险/费用 / Disclose assumptions/risks/fees
客户自主决定不施压 / Client decides without pressure
sourceRef: CMFAS M5 — Presentation of Analysis and Solutions to Clients
